metadata.scope: Consolidated post-change UI, interaction, performance, static-export, and documentation findings from subagent_bug_sweep_20260628_ui.xml and subagent_bug_sweep_20260628_perf.xml.

bug_1.title: Internal Mixpanel debug route is exposed in the public sitemap
bug_1.description: The generated public sitemap advertised https://embeddings.au/test-mixpanel even though src/app/test-mixpanel/page.jsx is an internal analytics debug page. Search crawlers and sitemap consumers could discover and index the test route, which is not part of the public marketing surface.
bug_1.evidence: Worker report found public/sitemap.xml and out/sitemap.xml included <loc>https://embeddings.au/test-mixpanel</loc> because src/lib/sitemap.js did not exclude /test-mixpanel from the app-directory scan.
bug_1.recommendation: Exclude /test-mixpanel from EXCLUDED_ROUTES, regenerate the sitemap, and keep the direct debug route marked noindex,nofollow.

bug_2.title: Mixpanel setup documentation is stale after analytics performance changes
bug_2.description: The Mixpanel setup guide still claimed the shared Button component had automatic click tracking and that session recording was configured at 100%, contradicting the current server-renderable Button and 10% replay default.
bug_2.evidence: Worker report found stale Button click tracking and 100% session recording references in documents/MIXPANEL_SETUP.md while src/components/Button.jsx deliberately discards legacy tracking props and src/lib/mixpanelClient.js defaults recording to 10%.
bug_2.recommendation: Update documents/MIXPANEL_SETUP.md so it describes explicit owner-component tracking, idle page-view tracking, and the NEXT_PUBLIC_MIXPANEL_RECORDING_PERCENT replay override.

bug_3.title: Mobile navigation panel clips open-menu content after enter animation
bug_3.description: The opened mobile navigation panel kept the animation’s final max-height after the enter animation completed because .navigation-panel-enter used animation-fill-mode: both. The panel also used overflow-hidden, so the lower offices/helper area could be clipped.
bug_3.evidence: Worker browser verification at 390x900 measured the open panel as clientHeight 832 and scrollHeight 1117 with maxHeight 832px. Desktop measured clientHeight 802 and scrollHeight 802.
bug_3.recommendation: Remove the persistent animation fill mode so max-height returns to none after the entrance animation completes, then re-test the open menu at 390x900 and 1440x900.
